arts.ttl: Derby County hero opens up as he faces lifesaving surgery
arts.sum: Marco Gabbiadini has revealed how he has been forced to stop exercising as he opened up on his wait for a lifesaving heart operation. The Derby hero, who made more than 200 appearances for the club, has been waiting five months for an operation but is now set to undergo the knife next week.

arts.ttl: Former Derby County boss Wayne Rooney hit with FA ban and fine
arts.sum: Former Derby County boss Wayne Rooney has been banned from the touchline for one game and fined £5,500 after he was sent off in Plymouth's win over Blackburn Rovers. The FA said in a statement: " Wayne Rooney has been given a one-match touchline ban and £5,500 fine for misconduct at Plymouth Argyle’s EFL Championship match against Blackburn Rovers on Saturday October 5.

arts.ttl: Neil Harris issues Derby County verdict and makes 'physical' claim ahead of Millwall clash
arts.sum: Neil Harris says Millwall "know what's coming" from Derby County and admits he has spent a long time studying Paul Warne's side. “[The key battles are] all over the pitch against Derby,” Harris said.

arts.ttl: Talksport pundit makes Pride Park stadium claim amid Derby County, Swansea and Cardiff comments
arts.sum: And despite the fans being able to whip up a brilliant atmosphere at Pride Park, Durham says it is similar to Cardiff and Swansea's new-build stadiums. TalkSport host Adrian Durham says Derby County's Pride Park stadium "doesn't stick in the memory" as he ranked all 24 Championship stadiums.

arts.ttl: Stats show 18th-placed Millwall should be in top four - Harris
arts.sum: Millwall manager Neil Harris says his side have not picked up the points their performances deserve and that statistics show they should be in the Championship's top four.

arts.ttl: Macaulay Langstaff wants scoring record to be judged on starts - with first Millwall goal one of his favourite career strikes
arts.sum: “It was an incredible feeling – it’s right up there with the favourite goals I’ve scored in my career because it is also about the level I’ve done it at, as well. “The first was that you’re over the moon that you have scored in the Championship and got your first goal for Millwall.

arts.ttl: Derby boss makes prediction ahead of Millwall clash
arts.sum: Derby boss Paul Warne is expecting a tight game against Millwall at The Den on Saturday. “Every away game is difficult.
